'''Saladar Systems''' was a technology company that specialized in personal safety technology<ref name="GFT" /> such as the [[Solo Strobe]] locator<ref name="PSG" /> and the [[PED-21 Distress Beacon]].<ref name="GFT" />

{{Company-stub}}
